extension.description: Align text blocks using delimiters like |, &, => or custom input. Useful for AsciiDoc tables, LaTeX align environments, Markdown tables, and general text formatting.
command.align.title: Align with Default Delimiter
command.alignWithPrompt.title: Align with Custom Delimiter
config.title: Align Delimited Block
config.defaultDelimiter.description: Default delimiter used by the default alignment command (Ctrl+Shift+A).
config.markdownTableCenterHeader.descrip: Center-align the Markdown table header row instead of following the separator alignment.
